chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 612 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.2331/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 12.09.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition.
